# services.mailhog

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.mailhog`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.mailhog.apiPort` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Port on which the API endpoint will listen. |
| `services.mailhog.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable MailHog, web and API based SMTP testing. |
| `services.mailhog.extraArgs` | `list of string` | List of additional arguments to pass to the MailHog process. |
| `services.mailhog.setSendmail` | `boolean` | Whether to enable set the system sendmail to mailhogs's. |
| `services.mailhog.smtpPort` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Port on which the SMTP endpoint will listen. |
| `services.mailhog.storage` | `one of "maildir", "memory"` | Store mails on disk or in memory. |
| `services.mailhog.uiPort` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Port on which the HTTP UI will listen. |
